title: Total wizard of Eva
wikitext:
[]: Total wizard of Eva             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Nov 20, 2006 4:43 pm Okay, I was thinking of how Evangelion could have similarities to other references and came up with this: Wizard of Oz Misato: Dorothy Pen pen: Toto Shinji: Lion (We all know he could use some courage) Asuka: Tin man (She needs a freakin' heart) Rei: Scarecrow (The whole quite-brainless-Rei we all know) SEELE: The wizard I'm not too sure about this part, but either Adam or Lilith represent the bad witch and the other one represents the good. There's probably a few other things I can't remember. But for now, any takers?

[]: Re: Total wizard of Eva             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Nov 20, 2006 5:23 pm poetic_assassin wrote: Okay, I was thinking of how Evangelion could have similarities to other references and came up with this: Wizard of Oz Misato: Wendy Pen pen: Toto Shinji: Lion (We all know he could use some courage) Asuka: Tin man (She needs a freakin' heart) Rei: Scarecrow (The whole quite-brainless-Rei we all know) SEELE: The wizard I'm not too sure about this part, but either Adam or Lilith represent the bad witch and the other one represents the good. There's probably a few other things I can't remember. But for now, any takers?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 20, 2006 5:35 pm Sorry, guy, I gotta move this one. It's too much.

[]: Re: Total wizard of Eva             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Nov 20, 2006 6:06 pm poetic_assassin wrote: SEELE: The wizard

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Mon Nov 20, 2006 6:10 pm The real test will be if Eva syncs with Dark Side Of The Moon

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Nov 20, 2006 6:30 pm jcmoorehead wrote: The real test will be if Eva syncs with Dark Side Of The Moon

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Mon Nov 20, 2006 9:53 pm Now we just have to find the scene in Eva where you can see one of Shinji's classmates commiting suicide by hanging in the background.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Nov 20, 2006 10:10 pm felineki wrote: Now we just have to find the scene in Eva where you can see one of Shinji's classmates commiting suicide by hanging in the background.
